strengths: Meets 15-year requirement with ~19-20 years of software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems, and infrastructure domains
Recent engagement with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks demonstrates awareness of cutting-edge AI tooling; proven ability to learn complex new domains
Demonstrated technical thought leadership through founding GISCollective, organizing workshops and Code Katas, and speaking at conferences like FOSS4G
concerns: AI/ML expertise appears nascent (4 months in current role); no demonstrated track record of building recognized AI products or platforms as required by job description
Missing preferred master's or PhD in AI-related field; holds two bachelor's degrees but neither in AI, ML, or theoretical computer science
Resume shows strong IC engineering contributions but lacks evidence of the strategic customer advisory, product vision-setting, and thought leadership on AI adoption required for director-level role
response.justification: Bogdan brings nearly 20 years of solid engineering experience across diverse domains and recent exposure to AI infrastructure, meeting the minimum requirements. However, the role demands director-level strategic thinking around AI differentiation and customer advisory—areas where the resume demonstrates IC and staff-level technical contributions rather than strategic vision-setting or recognized AI product expertise. AI engagement began only 4 months ago without evidence of building AI-powered products or platforms. The missing advanced degree in AI/ML further gaps the preferred profile for a strategy-focused AI principal role. While strong technical fundamentals and learning ability are evident, the specialized AI expertise and strategic leadership demonstrated are insufficient for this director-level position.
